interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get main homepage content including value proposition, service highlights, trust signals, and featured promotions (no navigation URLs).

interfaces.name: getQuoteRequestPageInitData
interfaces.description: Get initial data for the Quote Request page such as default move scope and home size options.

interfaces.name: getAvailableQuoteTimeSlots
interfaces.description: Get available move time slots and pricing for a quote request based on date, scope, home size, and addresses.

parameters.name: max_hourly_rate
parameters.description: Optional cap on hourly rate, e.g., 150 for 'under $150/hour'

interfaces.name: submitQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a quote request with move details, selected time slot, and contact information.

parameters.name: selected_hourly_rate
parameters.description: Snapshot of hourly rate at submission

interfaces.name: startMoveBooking
interfaces.description: Start a new move booking from a given source (direct, estimator, promotion, insurance, pricing, labor_only, quote). Creates a draft MoveBooking managed internally.

parameters.name: source_reference_id
parameters.description: When source_type is 'promotion', pass Promotion.id; when 'estimator', pass MoveEstimate.id; when 'insurance', pass InsurancePlan.id; when 'pricing', pass MovePackage.id; when 'quote', pass QuoteRequest.id

interfaces.name: getMoveBookingFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get selectable options for the Move Booking form (service types, property types, home sizes, add-ons, insurance options, crew sizes).

interfaces.name: getAvailableMovePackages
interfaces.description: Search available move packages for Pricing & Packages, Move Booking, and Labor-Only pages using filters and sorting.

parameters.name: includes_truck
parameters.description: When true, only show packages that include a truck; when false, only show 'no truck' packages

parameters.name: hourly_rate_max
parameters.description: Max allowed base hourly rate, e.g., 140 for 'under $140/hour'

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of packages to return

interfaces.name: getAvailableTimeSlotsForCurrentBooking
interfaces.description: Get available time slots for the currently active booking, taking into account selected service type, scope, crew size, package, and insurance.

parameters.name: max_total_estimate
parameters.description: Optional cap on total estimate including insurance and add-ons

interfaces.name: updateCurrentMoveBooking
interfaces.description: Update fields of the current MoveBooking (addresses, service details, package, add-ons, time slot, estimate, contact info). Creates a new draft booking if none exists.

parameters.name: add_on_ids
parameters.description: Array of AddOn.id values to include

interfaces.name: applyPromoCodeToCurrentBooking
interfaces.description: Apply a promo code to the current booking, validating eligibility and updating pricing.

interfaces.name: updateCurrentBookingInsurance
interfaces.description: Select or change the insurance plan and insured value for the current booking and update totals.

parameters.name: insured_value
parameters.description: Total value of belongings to insure, e.g., 15000

interfaces.name: getCurrentMoveBookingSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the current booking including move details and cost breakdown.

interfaces.name: confirmCurrentMoveBooking
interfaces.description: Confirm the current booking by capturing final contact details and marking the booking as pending/confirmed.

parameters.name: accept_terms
parameters.description: Must be true to confirm that the user accepted terms & conditions

interfaces.name: getPricingPageFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Pricing & Packages page.

interfaces.name: addPackageToComparisonList
interfaces.description: Add a move package to the current comparison list, creating the list if needed.

interfaces.name: getCurrentPackageComparisonSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the current package comparison list for UI badges or sidebars.

interfaces.name: getPackageComparisonDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for all packages in the current comparison list for side-by-side comparison.

interfaces.name: removePackageFromComparisonList
interfaces.description: Remove a package from the current comparison list.

interfaces.name: startMoveBookingWithPackage
interfaces.description: Start a new booking with a selected package from Pricing or Package Comparison pages.

interfaces.name: getMovingCostEstimatorInitData
interfaces.description: Get initialization data for the Moving Cost Estimator, including home size options and default inventory items.

interfaces.name: calculateMoveEstimate
interfaces.description: Calculate a move cost estimate based on home size and inventory items, optionally against a target budget.

interfaces.name: startMoveBookingFromEstimate
interfaces.description: Start a booking using a previously calculated MoveEstimate so that estimate details are prefilled into the booking.

interfaces.name: getLaborOnlyPageData
interfaces.description: Get descriptive content and available labor-only service options for the Labor-Only Services page.

interfaces.name: getLaborOnlyPackages
interfaces.description: Get labor-only packages filtered by crew size, duration, and hourly rate. Automatically restricts to 'labor_only' service_type and no truck included.

interfaces.name: selectLaborOnlyPackageForCurrentBooking
interfaces.description: Select a labor-only package and duration for the current booking, creating a new labor-only booking if none exists.

interfaces.name: getActivePromotionsList
interfaces.description: Get a list of active promotions for the Deals & Promotions page.

interfaces.name: getPromotionDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific promotion, including eligibility rules and description.

interfaces.name: startMoveBookingFromPromotion
interfaces.description: Start a booking linked to a specific promotion, so the promotion can be highlighted and validated during checkout.

interfaces.name: getInsurancePlansComparison
interfaces.description: Get a comparison list of available insurance and protection plans for the Moving Insurance & Protection page.

interfaces.name: getInsurancePlanDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for a specific insurance plan including coverage limits and pricing.

interfaces.name: startMoveBookingFromInsurancePlan
interfaces.description: Start a booking with a selected insurance plan preselected, used from the Moving Insurance & Protection page.

parameters.name: insured_value
parameters.description: Initial insured value for belongings, e.g., 15000

interfaces.name: getServicesOverviewContent
interfaces.description: Get overview content for main service categories: local moves, full-service moves, packing, storage add-on, and labor-only help.

interfaces.name: getAboutUsContent
interfaces.description: Get About Us content including company history, mission, credentials, and testimonials.

interfaces.name: getServiceAreasList
interfaces.description: Get the list of primary service areas including cities, neighborhoods, and supported ZIP codes.

interfaces.name: checkZipCoverage
interfaces.description: Check whether a given ZIP code is within the supported local service area and what move scopes are allowed.

interfaces.name: getFaqContent
interfaces.description: Get FAQ content grouped by topic, covering rates, services, promotions, and insurance.

interfaces.name: getContactPageInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact information including phone numbers, emails, business hours, and physical address.

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact or special request inquiry.

interfaces.name: getTermsAndConditionsContent
interfaces.description: Get Terms & Conditions content including sections on bookings, cancellations, and liability.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get Privacy Policy content describing data collection, storage, sharing, and user rights.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCurrentBooking
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current MoveBooking from session or create a new draft booking if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateBookingTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate booking totals (labor, add-ons, insurance, discounts) whenever booking details change.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreatePackageComparisonList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or create the current PackageComparisonList for the single-user session.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateEstimateTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute MoveEstimate subtotal, tax, and total based on EstimateItem line items.

helperFunctions.name: _validateAndApplyPromotion
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to check promotion eligibility against a MoveBooking and apply discounts if valid.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentQuoteDraft
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage in-progress quote request data before submission.
